plot outline: Kubo lives a quiet, normal life in a small shoreside village until a spirit from the past turns his life upside down by re-igniting an age-old vendetta. This causes all sorts of havoc as gods and monsters chase Kubo who, in order to survive, must locate a magical suit of armor once worn by his late father, a legendary Samurai warrior.
title: Kubo and the Two Strings
akas: Kubo y las dos cuerdas mágicas (Spain)
Kubo et l'armure magique (Benin, French title)
